channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [大V/权威] How did the government decide OpenAI’s frontier model was safe to release?
item.description:
📊 Score: 216 | Category: 大V/权威

  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • real_release
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: "Exactly what that dialog looked like between the government and Anthropic and OpenAI is unclear."...

item.title: [2] [模型算法] It Takes a MAESTRO To Prune Bad Experts
item.description:
📊 Score: 171 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L2-Tech:pruning(+25)
  • L3-Tech:transformer(+15)
  • L3-Tech:moe(+15)
  • edge_optimization
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Sparsely-activated Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language models achieve remarkable inference efficiency by activating only a small fraction of parameters per token, yet their full expert banks reside in memory at all times, creating a prohibitive deployment bottleneck. Existing structured pruning methods, largely designed for dense transformers, assess...

item.title: [4] [模型算法] BiSCo-LLM: Lookup-Free Binary Spherical Coding for Extreme Low-Bit Large Language Model Compression
item.description:
📊 Score: 139 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:model compression(+40)
  • L2-Tech:quantization(+25)
  • L3-Tech:rag(+15)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly constrained by memory capacity, weight bandwidth, and checkpoint storage during deployment. Existing low-bit compression methods mainly follow two directions. Scalar or group-wise quantization is simple and compatible with efficient low-precision kernels, but its representation capacity becomes limited ...

item.title: [5] [模型算法] CineMobile: On-Device Image-to-Video Diffusion for Cinematic Camera Motion Generation

item.title: [6] [模型算法] Geometry and Gradient-based Partitioning for Panoramic Outdoor Reconstruction
item.description:
📊 Score: 121 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • edge_optimization
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Scaling 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) to large outdoor scenes is costly in both data acquisition and computation. Adopting panoramic images with equirectangular projection (ERP) can reduce capture effort via their full $360^{\circ}$ field of view, yet the resulting omnipresent visibility invalidates existing partitioning strategies that rely on loca...

item.title: [10] [行业动态] Google will now disclose which ads are made with AI
item.description:
📊 Score: 72 | Category: 行业动态

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • L3-Tech:rag(+15)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: While Google prohibits misleading and deceptive ads, an ad can still leverage AI to create some type of synthetic or digitally altered content. Until now, that's something Google only required election ads to disclose....
